title: Aerated Fried Rice
description: A twist on the classic Chinese dish, adding a touch of bitterness for depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: aerated water
ingredients.notes: used to add lightness to the dish

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the bitter melon and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until slightly tender.
Add the Chinese rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until heated through.
Add the aerated water and stir-fry for another minute until the rice is light and fluffy.
Add the fried shallots and stir-fry for another minute until well combined.
Season with soy sauce and salt to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped green onions if desired.
